## NotebookLmDriver class

Drives the user's real, logged-in Chrome to create a NotebookLM notebook, add sources, and kick off an Audio Overview — via AppleScript (`osascript`<!-- -->), with no extension. macOS-only; requires Chrome's "Allow JavaScript from Apple Events". NotebookLM is not a chat platform, so this is a standalone driver (it does not implement the chat `Driver` interface).

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class NotebookLmDriver 
```

<tr><td>

[generateAudioOverview(nb, opts)](./sdk.notebooklmdriver.generateaudiooverview.md)


</td><td>


</td><td>

Opens "Customize Audio Overview", sets format/length/prompt, and clicks Generate. Returns immediately after clicking Generate; the audio renders asynchronously (minutes) — callers do not await completion.


</td></tr>
